changeSet.author: sumicare
changeSet.sql: UPDATE packages SET is_active = true WHERE code = 'PKG_MASSAGE_COUPLE' AND organization_id = (SELECT id FROM organizations WHERE slug = 'lasema');

changeSet.author: sumicare
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO package_tiers (package_id, service_id, weekday_price, weekend_price) SELECT p.id, s.id, 3800, 4200 FROM packages p JOIN services_catalogue s ON s.organization_id = p.organization_id WHERE p.code = 'PKG_MASSAGE_COUPLE' AND p.organization_id = (SELECT id FROM organizations WHERE slug = 'lasema') AND s.code IN ('SALT_GLOW_SCRUB','DAEMIDI','THAI','MILK_BATH_SCRUB','AROMA_REFLEX','VENTOSA','TANDEM') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM package_tiers pt2 WHERE pt2.package_id = p.id AND pt2.service_id = s.id );
